text.message: Blue I thought for sure you’d take the 8-10 ore with 3:1 port
Everybody robbing me but black and blue have built more…
Played a game earlier where so,done had 2 cities on 12 brick and it rolled 3 times Ina. Row, they took longest road ftw haha
And then play knight next turn to win
Such a joke trading somebody a “block” that will actually make them have more points
